script: a person who has stood inside a colour, briefly, and recognized it

props.headline: You've stood inside a colour, briefly

props.quote: Poetry doesn't sharpen your frameworks. It doesn't solve problems.

script: That is not a small thing. It is the whole thing

script: The poem finds you. Your only job is to not keep the door entirely shut
